ops.title: getaway v2: testing + CI infrastructure
ops.description: pytest suite per plan (doctrine-named cases, real-subprocess flock test, fingerprint matrix vs frozen clock, respx fixtures with real API gotchas, CliRunner integration proving second sweep run does zero HTTP); tests/workflow harness.mjs; ci.yml extended with ruff + ty + pytest + node --test + jq empty over data/.

ops.text: full CI green locally and on GitHub after push

doctrine tests exist and pass: soft_avoid_sorts_never_filters, barely_demotes_within_band_only, gateway_mode_omits_dest_veto, expansion_buffer_precedes_classification, note_tier_never_reorders, afford_annotates_never_gates
integration test asserts fresh re-run performs zero HTTP calls
